Rubs, Sauces & More

Everything you need to fire up your next BBQ — hand-picked products for the real BBQ lover.

Hot Sauce
Melinda's Hot Sauce
Award-winning hot sauces perfect for BBQ. From mild to extra hot — the perfect complement to smoked meats.

Smokin Hot Guys BBQ

Rubs & Sauces
Blazing Star BBQ Bundle
Sugar-free, veteran-owned BBQ rub set — All-In-One Seasoning, Beef Rub & Pork'n Rub. Bold flavor for beef, pork, chicken, and veggies. Keto-friendly & MSG-free.

Grills & Smokers
Oklahoma Joe's Drum Smoker
The classic drum smoker built for serious BBQ. Perfect for smoking brisket, ribs, chicken and more with consistent low-and-slow heat.

Olive Oil
Graza Olive Oil
Fresh, single-origin extra virgin olive oil in a squeeze bottle. Sizzle for cooking, Drizzle for finishing. Perfect for BBQ marinades, basting, and more!
🫙 Shop Graza
Drinkware
PourCaddy
The ultimate on-the-go barkeep. 20oz double-insulated stainless steel flask with a patented pour spout, 4 hidden shot cups, and leak-proof lid. Perfect for BBQ tailgates, cookouts & more!
🥃 Shop PourCaddy
Thermometers & Gear
ThermoWorks
Professional-grade instant-read and leave-in thermometers trusted by pitmasters everywhere. Know your temp, nail your cook — every time.
🌡️ Shop ThermoWorks
Grill Cleaning
Electric BBQ Grill Brush
Cordless & rechargeable electric grill brush — effortlessly scrubs grates clean. Includes gloves, scraper & USB-C charging. No more wire bristle worries.

Hot Sauce
Goblin Boss Gobblin' Sauce
Smoky chipotle, red serrano & garlic — medium heat with a splash of lime. Perfect on tacos, pizza, eggs & more. One taste and you'll be gobblin' for more. $11.99

Our Mission

About PitQuest

When it comes to good BBQ, we want to go beyond the norm and explore all. Mainstream to hidden gems — PitQuest sets the standard in finding great BBQ no matter where you are.
